code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut c0 = 0
  mut c1 = 0
  mut c2 = 0
  mut c3 = 0
  mut c4 = 0
  mut c5 = 0
  mut c6 = 0
  mut c7 = 0
  mut c8 = 0
  mut c9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      match b
      when 48
        c0 = c0 + 1
      when 49
        c1 = c1 + 1
      when 50
        c2 = c2 + 1
      when 51
        c3 = c3 + 1
      when 52
        c4 = c4 + 1
      when 53
        c5 = c5 + 1
      when 54
        c6 = c6 + 1
      when 55
        c7 = c7 + 1
      when 56
        c8 = c8 + 1
      when 57
        c9 = c9 + 1
      when _
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print_line(0, c0)
  print_line(1, c1)
  print_line(2, c2)
  print_line(3, c3)
  print_line(4, c4)
  print_line(5, c5)
  print_line(6, c6)
  print_line(7, c7)
  print_line(8, c8)
  print_line(9, c9)
end

fn print_line(_ digit: Int, _ count: Int) -> Unit
  mut bar = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    bar = "#{bar}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  println("#{digit}: #{bar}")
end
